blockingIssues.description: The generate_threejs function and its logic are still present in the file src/app/services/gemini_audio.py.
The generate_image function and its logic are still present in the file src/app/services/gemini_audio.py.
MCP_SERVER_URL environment variable reference is still defined in the config src/app/core/config.py.
mcp_tools and mcp_tool_mapping variables are still initialized and passed to GeminiLive() in src/app/api/v1/endpoints/live.py.

appliedUpdates.description: Updated install_frontend to use --legacy-peer-deps, and backend start/healthcheck to use Windows-compatible syntax ($env:PORT=8000; and curl.exe -sf).
Created library/frontend-electron.md to document Vite's requirement for base: './' in Electron apps and Windows-specific command syntax.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify if # noqa tags are preferred or forbidden for fixing Ruff lint errors (specifically C901 and E501).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Worker in fix-backend-lint-errors used # noqa extensively to silence complexity and line length errors rather than refactoring the code.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update the backend-worker procedure to explicitly allow skipping the 'write failing tests first' step when the task is purely fixing existing lint errors or refactoring.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Worker in fix-backend-lint-errors skipped step 3 of the procedure because there was no new logic to test.

rejectedObservations.observation: Worker spent significant time struggling to run npm install because node and npm were not in the default system PATH during the session.
rejectedObservations.reason: environment-specific anomaly; the worker fixed it by adding the path manually during the run. Does not belong in global project documentation.
